致各大傳媒機構、採訪主任、編輯及記者：

民間記者會傳媒邀請函

第五次的民間記者會主題為：「 公民權利大倒退」。 團隊希望能借是次機會，提供多角度意見， 還原事實真相 ，從而反駁警方及政府過去的謊言、以及社會的誤解和迷思。

現誠邀 貴機構派員出席採訪，詳情如下：

日期：2019年8月19日
時間：14：00

記者會後將設有問答環節，由於會場座位有限，有興趣進場採訪的媒體請於 8月 19日（星期一）早上11點00分或之前，以電話（94377274）、Telegram（pr640212）或電郵（pr640212@gmail.com ）覆示，以便安排。

如有查詢，請聯絡金先生 （電話：94377274）。謝謝


此致

採訪主任、編輯及記者


金先生 謹啟

2019 年 8 月 19 日

Dear Members of the Press,

Re: Invitation to Fifth Citizens’ Press Conference on 19th August 2019

The fifth citizens’ press conference will cover the topic “ The Onslaught on Civil Rights”. Our team would like to this this opportunity to provide more perspectives into understanding recent events, so as to unveil the truth untold and counteract the misleading information provided by the Hong Kong Police Force and the Hong Kong SAR Government.

We hereby cordially invite your organisation to attend our press conference. The details of the event are as follows:


Date: 19th August, 2019
Time: 14:00

There will be a question-and-answer session at the end of the press conference. Since the anti-extradition bill movement is characterized by the participation of many civilians without leadership or organization, we may not be able to represent all protesters by responding to some questions that may require more deliberation. In such cases, we will take note of those questions and provide our responses in future press conferences. We hope to seek for your understanding regarding this arrangement.

In view of limited capacity of the venue, should you wish to attend the press conference, we would be grateful if you could confirm your attendance by contacting our representative by 11.00a.m. today.

Phone: 94377274
Email: pr640212@gmail.com
Telegram: pr640212

Should you have any further questions, please do not hesitate to contact our representative with information as stated above. Thank you for your kind attention.

Yours Sincerely,

Mr. KIM

On behalf of Citizens' Press Conference
